meta.summary: Trinity de novo RNA-seq transcriptome assembly with the core Trinity components and required runtime tools.
meta.description: Trinity de novo RNA-seq transcriptome assembly with the core Trinity components and required runtime tools.

test: (Trinity --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F 'Trinity --seqType' >/dev/null && (Trinity --help 2>&1 || true) | grep -F -- '--max_memory' >/dev/null && (Trinity --show_full_usage_info 2>&1 || true) | grep -F -- '--no_normalize_reads' >/dev/null && (Trinity --show_full_usage_info 2>&1 || true) | grep -F -- '--genome_guided_bam' >/dev/null

samtools --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'samtools 1.' >/dev/null && jellyfish --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'jellyfish 2.' >/dev/null && bowtie2 --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'version 2.' >/dev/null && salmon --version 2>&1 | grep -F 'salmon' >/dev/null && blastn -version 2>&1 | grep -F 'blastn:' >/dev/null && java -version 2>&1 | grep -E '(openjdk|java)' >/dev/null && perl -MDB_File -MURI::Escape -e1 && python3 -c 'import numpy'

for x in /opt/trinity/Inchworm/bin/inchworm /opt/trinity/Chrysalis/bin/Chrysalis /opt/trinity/Chrysalis/bin/QuantifyGraph /opt/trinity/Chrysalis/bin/GraphFromFasta /opt/trinity/Chrysalis/bin/ReadsToTranscripts /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/BIN/ParaFly /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/BIN/seqtk-trinity /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/bamsifter/bamsifter /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/bamsifter/_sift_bam_max_cov /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/slclust/bin/slclust /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/COLLECTL/collectl/collectl; do test -x $x; done && ! ldd /opt/trinity/Inchworm/bin/inchworm 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null && ! ldd /opt/trinity/Chrysalis/bin/Chrysalis 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null && ! ldd /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/BIN/ParaFly 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null && ! ldd /opt/trinity/trinity-plugins/bamsifter/_sift_bam_max_cov 2>&1 | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trinity-stats && cd /tmp/taf-trinity-stats && printf '>TRINITY_DN0_c0_g1_i1
ACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGTACGT
>TRINITY_DN0_c0_g2_i1
ACGTACGTACGT
' > transcripts.fa && TrinityStats.pl transcripts.fa > stats.txt && grep -F 'Total trinity transcripts:' stats.txt >/dev/null && grep -F 'Contig N50:' stats.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trinity-normalize && cd /tmp/taf-trinity-normalize && insilico_read_normalization.pl --seqType fq --JM 1G --max_cov 50 --left /opt/trinity/sample_data/test_Trinity_Assembly/reads.left.fq.gz --right /opt/trinity/sample_data/test_Trinity_Assembly/reads.right.fq.gz --pairs_together --CPU 1 --output norm >/tmp/taf-trinity-normalize/norm.log 2>&1 && test -s norm/left.norm.fq && test -s norm/right.norm.fq

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-trinity-assembly && cd /tmp/taf-trinity-assembly && Trinity --seqType fq --max_memory 2G --left /opt/trinity/sample_data/test_Trinity_Assembly/reads.left.fq.gz --right /opt/trinity/sample_data/test_Trinity_Assembly/reads.right.fq.gz --SS_lib_type RF --CPU 1 --no_normalize_reads --no_salmon --output trinity_smoke_out >/tmp/taf-trinity-assembly/run.log 2>&1 && test -s trinity_smoke_out.Trinity.fasta && grep -F 'TRINITY_' trinity_smoke_out.Trinity.fasta >/dev/null

upstream.name: Trinity
upstream.license: BSD-3-Clause with bundled third-party components including ParaFly, seqtk-trinity, Trimmomatic, collectl, bamsifter/htslib, and Ubuntu-packaged runtime tools
upstream.citation: Grabherr et al. 2011; Haas et al. 2013
